section.heading: Civil action by Attorney General for equitable relief
section.chapeau: The Attorney General may bring a civil action in the United States District Court for the District of Columbia for appropriate equitable relief if the corporation—

paragraph.content: engages or threatens to engage in any act, practice, or policy that is inconsistent with the purposes in section 152402 of this title; or
refuses, fails, or neglects to carry out its obligations under this chapter or threatens to do so.
